data.title: SEC Delays Crypto Regulatory Exemptions Amid Wall Street Concerns
data.description: SEC Chair Paul Atkins has announced a delay in the timeline for issuing broad crypto-related regulatory exemptions, which were initially expected in January. According to NS3.AI, the postponement comes after Wall Street firms expressed concerns about the potential risks these exemptions could pose to investor protection and market stability. Atkins noted that the finalization of the crypto innovation exemptions will depend on further developments in Senate legislation and ongoing regulatory considerations.

data.title: SpaceX is reportedly in talks with xAI regarding a merger.
data.description: Sources familiar with the matter revealed that SpaceX and xAI, both owned by Elon Musk, are discussing a merger ahead of their IPO this year. This merger would integrate Musk's rockets, Starlink satellites, the X social media platform, and the Grok AI chatbot. The plan would inject new momentum into SpaceX's efforts to put data centers into orbit. Musk is striving to gain a leading position in the rapidly escalating AI race against tech giants like Google, Meta, and OpenAI. Under the proposed merger, xAI stock would be converted into SpaceX stock. Sources said two offices have been established in Nevada to assist with the transaction.

data.title: Sui Wallet to Integrate DeepBook's Point Program
data.description: Sui Wallet is set to support DeepBook's (DEEP) point program by integrating with its earning campaign. According to NS3.AI, this partnership enables Sui Wallet users to earn reward points through activities on applications developed on DeepBook. The collaboration seeks to boost user engagement and encourage participation within DeepBook's ecosystem.

data.title: Significant PENGU Transfers from Pudgy Penguins Address
data.description:
According to Arkham data, two substantial PENGU transactions occurred from the Pudgy Penguins address between 05:04 and 05:06. According to ChainCatcher, the total amount transferred was 1,450,186,095.5 PENGU.

At 05:04, 1,166,666,663.75 PENGU were moved from Pudgy Penguins to an anonymous address starting with GHQKN. Two minutes later, at 05:06, another 283,519,431.75 PENGU were transferred to a different anonymous address beginning with CrDuS.

data.title: Bit Digital will completely exit Bitcoin mining and focus on Ethereum and AI infrastructure.
data.description: Ethereum treasury company Bit Digital (NASDAQ: BTBT) announced plans to completely cease its Bitcoin mining operations and instead focus on Ethereum infrastructure, staking, and high-performance computing (HPC/AI) strategies. In a letter to shareholders, CEO Sam Tabar stated that with market changes, mining is no longer the most capital-efficient option. The company will concentrate its digital asset exposure on Ethereum and strengthen its AI infrastructure footprint through a controlling stake in WhiteFiber, aiming for sustainable, monetizable, and compounded long-term growth. Bit Digital entered the Bitcoin mining field in 2020 and began accumulating and staking ETH around the time Ethereum transitioned to PoS in 2022. Starting in 2023, the company pioneered its HPC/AI strategy and by mid-2025 clearly transitioned to a "pure Ethereum treasury and staking" model, gradually selling mining rigs, terminating hosting contracts, and phasing out older equipment. Its AI subsidiary, WhiteFiber, completed its IPO last year, and Bit Digital currently holds approximately 27 million shares.

data.title: Key Factors Influencing Bitcoin Investment Demand
data.description: The article identifies seven crucial factors driving demand for Bitcoin investment, focusing on institutional access, macro liquidity, market structure, and benchmark stability. According to NS3.AI, investors should regularly monitor specific metrics, including ETF assets under management, weekly fund flows, Federal Reserve liquidity data, and network security. The article emphasizes the importance of updating investment strategies based on measurable inputs rather than price narratives, offering guidance for long-term holders, swing traders, and institutional allocators.

data.title: Apple Anticipates Strong Revenue Growth in Q1 2026 Amid iPhone 17 Sales and AI Expansion
data.description: Apple is preparing to announce its Q1 2026 earnings, with projections indicating substantial revenue growth fueled by the successful sales of the iPhone 17 and the expansion of AI-driven services. According to NS3.AI, the company has recently formed a strategic alliance with Google to enhance its AI technology capabilities and has acquired the AI startup Q.ai for approximately $2 billion. The anticipated growth in revenue is expected to be driven by increased sales in iPhones, services, and the Chinese market, with significant year-over-year improvements forecasted.

data.title: NTSB Investigates Waymo Vehicle Collision in California
data.description: The National Transportation Safety Board (NTSB) is conducting a safety investigation into a collision involving a Waymo vehicle and a pedestrian that occurred on January 23 in California. According to Jin10, the incident has raised concerns about the safety of autonomous vehicles and their interaction with pedestrians. The investigation aims to determine the cause of the accident and assess the safety measures in place for self-driving technology. The findings could have implications for the future development and regulation of autonomous vehicles.

data.title: Real-World Asset Tokens: Chainlink, Keeta, and Maple Finance Outlook for February 2026
data.description:
The performance and future prospects of three significant real-world asset tokens—Chainlink (LINK), Keeta (KTA), and Maple Finance (SYRUP)—are under review as February 2026 approaches. According to NS3.AI, Chainlink is experiencing short-term bearish pressure due to whale selling and negative social sentiment. However, the inflow of ETFs is providing some support against these challenges.

Keeta is witnessing mixed activity from whales, with technical indicators suggesting a potential bullish trend. Meanwhile, Maple Finance is showing consistent whale accumulation and maintaining resilient price action, even as it consolidates. These dynamics highlight the varied trajectories and market conditions facing each of these tokens as they move into the new month.
